title: Make native_sim L2 packet-path proof the firmware gate
description: Why this exists: before hardware bring-up, the active Zephyr L2 path must prove actual packet movement, not just compile and boot. What needs to be done: complete project-LICHEN-kxbj or equivalent so IPv6/UDP/CoAP traverses LICHEN_L2 TX, LoRa loopback, LICHEN link RX, SCHC decompression, and Zephyr networking ingress. Acceptance criteria: automated Linux/native_sim test exists; test fails if raw bypass paths are used; EC2 builder instructions are documented if local host cannot run native_sim; three independent codereview subagents run after code changes and findings are recorded.
